name: Pasta with Coriander Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in a large quantity of boiling water until just tender.
2. While the pasta is cooking, wash the coriander under cold running water.
Cut away the root end and discard it. Roughly chop the stems and leaves.
3. Blend the coriander, olive oil, pine nuts, and peeled garlic clove in a blender or food processor until well combined.
4. Transfer the coriander mixture to a bowl. Stir in the grated parmesan cheese and poppy seeds.
5. Drain the hot fettuccine and mix through the pesto mixture. Place on a large serving platter, sprinkle with the extra toasted pine nuts, and serve.
